hero.description: Production-ready configurations for Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, and more. Copy, paste, and let your AI agent work the way you want.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.browseDesc: Find configs by framework, use case, or tags. Every config is reviewed for quality.
howItWorks.copyDesc: One-click copy. Drop it into your project as CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, or any config file.
howItWorks.shareDesc: Submit your configs via GitHub PR. Free or premium — you set the price.

cta.title: Got a killer agent config?
cta.description: Share it with the community or sell it as a premium config. Your expertise, your rules, your revenue.

configs.title: Browse Configs
configs.empty: No configs match your filters. Try adjusting them.

submit.title: Submit a Config
submit.description: Share your AI agent configuration with the community.

contributors.title: Contributors
contributors.subtitle: The people behind the configs. Want to join? Submit your config via GitHub PR.

generator.title: Config Generator
generator.subtitle: Describe your ideal AI agent and we'll generate a production-ready config for you.
generator.describePlaceholder: e.g. A React + TypeScript fullstack developer that follows clean architecture, uses Vitest for testing, and writes detailed commit messages...
generator.needApiKey: Please set your OpenRouter API key first (use the Try it button on any config page).
generator.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please set a new one via any config's Try it button.

tryIt.apiKeyDesc: Your key is stored locally and never sent to our servers.
